Enum Class CompareCondition.ComparisonFunction

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<CompareCondition.ComparisonFunction>
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.CompareCondition.ComparisonFunction
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<CompareCondition.ComparisonFunction>, Constable
Enclosing class:
CompareCondition
public static enum CompareCondition.ComparisonFunction extends Enum<CompareCondition.ComparisonFunction>
Comparison type for DELEX and SET command.
Since:
4.1
Author:
Yordan Tsintsov, Mark Paluch

      public static CompareCondition.ComparisonFunction valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
